elements.text:
You and your friends took some pictures together. You look through your social media feed and see that they tagged you in a post. You don't like how you look in the picture.

Here are some feelings that might happen in the moment:

texts: I feel angry at my friend, but know that they didn't know how I feel about the picture.
I'm insecure about how I look in the picture, but that was only one moment in time.
I'm annoyed that this isn't a flattering picture of me.
I'm happy with the memories we made.
